name: Cindy Hyde-Smith
stanceSummary: Official Senate statements and floor activity support robust military and diplomatic backing for Israel. Track AIPAC reports significant Israel Lobby funding for this campaign history.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $814,281.
